2026-04-08T18:36:30.8530623Z

2026-04-08T18:36:32.8350420Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8606065Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8610960Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8650279Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8898724Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8908373Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-08T18:36:32.8951496Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
